opinion.h2: Joseph S. HOPPER, Warden, Petitioner v. James Andrew JOHNSON a/k/a Jerry Leon Brooks No. 81-60
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The motion of respondent for leave to proceed in forma pauperis is granted. Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.[ Hopper v. Johnson 454 U.S. 1010 (1981) ]
